then         apt-get purge -y --auto-remove         && rm -rf "$tempDir" /etc/apt/sources.list.d/temp.list;     fi     && ln -sf /dev/stdout /var/log/nginx/access.log     && ln -sf /dev/stderr /var/log/nginx/error.log     && mkdir /docker-entrypoint.d
